About Me

Hi! I'm Hunter Tortorella, an indie game developer and digital artist based in New Haven, Connecticut. I specialize in creating emotionally immersive 2D and 3D art, blending stylized visuals with narrative-driven gameplay. My work focuses on exploring mental health awareness and human connection through interactive experiences.

I enjoy experimenting with hybrid 2D/3D workflows, interactive storytelling, and building games that challenge players while leaving an emotional impact. When I’m not working on games, you can find me exploring visual design, pixel art, or researching the latest game engine technologies.

Skills & Interests

  • Unity
  • Unreal Engine
  • 3D Modeling & Sculpting
  • 2D Pixel Art
  • Narrative Design
  • Animation
  • Sound Design
  • Interactive Storytelling
